description: PixelPunch Studios. Mobile gaming shop out of SEA. Currently AppsFlyer, moving to Singular by 2026-07-30. They ship iOS, Android, and use Unity for the game engine layer. Data-driven attribution. Backend Go, no warehouse, no CDP, OAuth 2.0 auth. Integration methods: S2S Postbacks and Meta Ads. Standard onboarding pace. SDK Events for event tracking.
